We got to meet one of the Artists!  He was very friendly and personable; he shared much of his story and how he came to America alone, began to isolate and decided he needed a “hobby” - I assure you his work is no “hobby” it’s incredible!

It all seems to be promoting the work of a self-appointed Buddha. And even explains that they only Buddha you can trust is one who is self-appointed, but I like a lot of the art and the descriptions were so over-the-top and so unlike anything I had seen before with extraordinary praisethat I was completely one over. And it’s free.
